title: AI Code Refactoring: Tools, Tactics & Best Practices
summary: This guide presents a systematic approach to AI-assisted code refactoring, leveraging semantic dependency analysis, atomic transformations, and automated quality gates. It describes how modern AI tools can perform variable renaming, function extraction, dead-code elimination, and documentation updates while preserving behavior. The post outlines a multi-phase refactoring workflow, compares leading AI refactoring platforms (Augment Code, Refraction, CodeScene, Windsurf), and provides best practices for enterprise adoption, including hallucination monitoring and CI/CD integration. The guidance emphasizes incremental changes, human oversight, and measurable improvements in code review speed and regression reduction.
author: Molisha Shah
